title: Junior Revenue Manager at Six Senses India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Six Senses India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Six Senses India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Six Senses India Capital India:
Six Senses India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India Capital India!
